title: Melted Yeasty Russian Taleggio Flatbread
description: A yeasty and crumbly Russian dish featuring taleggio cheese, this flatbread is a crowd-pleaser that is easy to make and fun to eat. It is perfect for a quick snack or as a side dish for a meal.

ingredients.name: active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: instant yeast can be used as a substitute

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the broiler and punch down the dough.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place the dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Top each dough circle with a slice of taleggio cheese and a sprinkle of salt.
Drizzle the melted butter over the cheese and dough.
Broil the flatbreads for 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the dough is golden brown.
